message:
🌱 Add kubearmor: feat: Leverage OCI Hooks for Container Events mission (#1078)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubearmor-1390-feat-leverage-oci-hooks-for-container-events",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubearmor: feat: Leverage OCI Hooks for Container Events",
+    "description": "feat: Leverage OCI Hooks for Container Events. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubearmor deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubearmor version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor\nhelm list -n kubearmor 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubearmor installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubearmor configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubearmor configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor\nkubectl get configmap -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubearmor\n```\n## Feature Request\n\n**Short Description**\n\n Use OCI hooks and get events in context to container start/stop: Currently KubeArmor mounts docker/containerd/crio UNIX domain socket file in KubeArmor to watch for container events."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for feat: Leverage OCI Hooks for Container Events",
+        "description": "Hey Folks, Thanks for the interest in the mentorship. We have certain prerequisites which we expect to be included in your application. Please include details or reference to a document for the said prerequisite in your Cover Letter / Mail to the mentors / Submit it in the issue thread / DM Mentors\n```yaml\n[plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".containerd.runtimes.runc.options]\n    SystemdCgroup = true\n    [plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".containerd.runtimes.runc.options.Runtime]\n        RuntimeType = \"io.containerd.runc.v2\"\n    [plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".containerd.runtimes.runc.options.Hooks]\n        [plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".containerd.runtimes.runc.options.Hooks.prestart]\n            path = \"/var/ocihooks/prestarthook.sh\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor\nkubectl get events -n kubearmor --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"feat: Leverage OCI Hooks for Container Events\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hey Folks, Thanks for the interest in the mentorship. We have certain prerequisites which we expect to be included in your application. Please include details or reference to a document for the said prerequisite in your Cover Letter / Mail to the mentors / Submit it in the issue thread / DM Mentors in KubeArmor Slack by 20 Feb.\n\nFollowing are the details.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".containerd.runtimes.runc.options]\n    SystemdCgroup = true\n    [plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".containerd.runtimes.runc.options.Runtime]\n        RuntimeType = \"io.containerd.runc.v2\"\n    [plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".containerd.runtimes.runc.options.Hooks]\n        [plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".containerd.runtimes.runc.options.Hooks.prestart]\n            path = \"/var/ocihooks/prestarthook.sh\"",
+        "#!/bin/bash\n\necho \"Setting the desired default container runtime to 'crio'\"\nexport DEFAULT_CONTAINER_RUNTIME=\"crio\"\necho \"OCI hook executed successfully! at $(date)\" >> /usr/share/containers/oci/hooks.d/hook_log.txt",
+        "{\n    \"version\": \"1.0.0\",\n    \"hook\": {\n        \"path\": \"/usr/share/containers/oci/hooks.d/prestarthook.sh\"\n    },\n    \"when\": {\n        \"always\": true \n    },\n    \"stages\": [\"createContainer\", \"poststop\"] \n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubearmor",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubearmor"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {

+    },

+    "comments": 23,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kubearmor installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
